positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_problem.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos_problem.tptp
1. ! [X0] : (published_by(X0,new_vessel_press) => translated_from(X0,italian)) [input(axiom)]
4. published_by(palace_of_flies,new_vessel_press) [input(axiom)]
6. translated_from(palace_of_flies,italian) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~translated_from(palace_of_flies,italian) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ~translated_from(palace_of_flies,italian) [flattening 7]
9. ! [X0] : (translated_from(X0,italian) | ~published_by(X0,new_vessel_press)) [ennf transformation 1]
10. ~published_by(X0,new_vessel_press) | translated_from(X0,italian) [cnf transformation 9]
13. published_by(palace_of_flies,new_vessel_press) [cnf transformation 4]
17. ~translated_from(palace_of_flies,italian) [cnf transformation 8]
19. translated_from(palace_of_flies,italian) [resolution 10,13]
20. $false [forward subsumption resolution 19,17]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_problem.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_problem.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u15,axiom,
    new_vessel_press != palace_of_flies).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    neapolitan_chronicles != palace_of_flies).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    new_vessel_press != neapolitan_chronicles).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define published_by(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define translated_from(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
